title: Hello, Friend!
lrc:
[00:00.00]Hello, hello, hello, friend!
[00:03.50]Hi to you and hi again!
[00:07.00]Good morning, sunny day,
[00:10.50]Let's all learn and let's all play!
[00:14.00]Bye, bye, see you soon!
[00:17.50]Bye, bye, afternoon!
[00:21.00]Wave your hand and smile so bright,
[00:24.50]We'll be back, we're feeling right!
